reports.title: Node Properties
reports.query:
call db.schema.nodeTypeProperties() yield nodeLabels, propertyName 
where $neodash_label in nodeLabels
call {with propertyName
      match (n) where  n[propertyName] is not null and $neodash_label in labels(n)
      return count(n) as num}
return propertyName as `Field Name`, num as `N. entries`
order by num desc

reports.title: Subgraph from selected relationship
reports.query:
match (n)-[r]->(b)
where $neodash_relation = type(r)
return n, r,  b limit 200

reports.title: Number of Nodes
reports.query: match (n) return count(n)

reports.title: Number of Relations
reports.query: match (n)-[r]->(b) return count(r)

reports.title: Nodes by Label
reports.query:
call db.labels() yield label
call {
with label
match (n) where label in labels(n)
return count(n) as num
}
return label as `Node Label`, num  as `N. of Nodes`order by `N. of Nodes` desc

reports.title: Selected node type...
reports.query: return $neodash_label

reports.title: Relations by Type
reports.query:
call db.relationshipTypes() yield relationshipType
call {
with relationshipType
match (n)-[r]->(b) where relationshipType =type(r)
return count(r) as num
}
return relationshipType as `Rel Type`, num  as `N.`order by `N.` desc
# ***Some stats about the graph ...***

reports.title: Node Relations
reports.query:
match (n) where  $neodash_label in labels(n)
match (n)-[r]-(b)
return type(r) as rel, count(n) as num
order by num desc

reports.title: Seleziona la tematica secondaria
reports.query:
match (root:Field) 
where root.name = $neodash_field_name
//ricerca subfield diretti
optional match (f:Field)-[:SUBFIELD_OF]->(root)
with root, case when collect(f) = [] then [root] else collect(f) end as children

unwind children as child
call { with child
optional match (child)<-[:SUBFIELD_OF*]-(f:Field)
with child, case when collect(distinct f)=[] then [child] else collect(distinct f) end as children
with child, children + child as all_children
unwind all_children as ch
optional match (ch)<-[:TAGGED_WITH]-(d:Document)
where d.year is not null
return count(distinct d) as docsInChild
}
return child.name as Field, docsInChild as `N. doc`  
order by `N. doc` DESC

reports.title: Andamento della tematica di discussione nel tempo
Seleziona la tematica (Main Field)
reports.query:
MATCH (d:Document)-[:TAGGED_WITH]->(f:Field)
where d.year is not null
OPTIONAL MATCH (root)<-[:SUBFIELD_OF*]-(f)
WHERE NOT EXISTS{
 MATCH (root)-[:SUBFIELD_OF*]->()
}
WITH d, CASE WHEN root IS NOT NULL THEN root ELSE f END AS parent
WITH parent, count(DISTINCT d) AS `N. doc in Field` 
RETURN parent.name AS Field, `N. doc in Field` 
ORDER BY `N. doc in Field`  DESC
#  *Tematiche di discussione*

reports.title: Chi scrive nella tematica
reports.query:
match (r:Field) where r.name = $neodash_field_name
call {with r
OPTIONAL MATCH (r)<-[:SUBFIELD_OF*]-(f)
WITH r, CASE WHEN f IS NOT NULL THEN f ELSE r END AS child
WITH r, collect(distinct child.name) as children
return r as root, children  AS fields
}
with  root, fields
match (p:Person)-[:WRITTEN_BY]-(d:Document)-[:TAGGED_WITH]-(f:Field)
where f.name in fields
with  p, root, count(distinct d) as w
order by w DESC limit 12
RETURN p, apoc.create.vRelationship(p, "IN", {weight: toFloat(w)}, root), root

reports.title: Chi riceve nella tematica
reports.query:
match (r:Field) where r.name = $neodash_field_name
call {with r
OPTIONAL MATCH (f)-[:SUBFIELD_OF*]->(r)
WITH r, CASE WHEN f IS NOT NULL THEN f ELSE r END AS child
WITH r, collect(child.name) as children
return r as root, children + r.name AS fields
}
with  root, fields
match (p:Person)<-[:RECEIVED_BY]-(d:Document)-[:TAGGED_WITH]->(f:Field)
where f.name in fields
with p, root, count(distinct d) as w
order by w DESC limit 12
RETURN root, apoc.create.vRelationship(root, "IN", {weight: toFloat(w)}, p), p

## **Ci sono temi di discussione che sono associabili solo a determinati autori ?**
(mittenti o destinatari)

reports.title: Tematica selezionata
reports.query: return $neodash_field_name

reports.title: Libri citati nell'ambito della tematica
reports.query:
call {
match (r:Field) where r.name = $neodash_field_name
OPTIONAL MATCH (f)-[:SUBFIELD_OF*]->(r)
WITH r, CASE WHEN f IS NOT NULL THEN f ELSE r END AS child
WITH r, collect(child.name) as children
return children + r.name AS fields
}
with fields
match (d:Document)-[:TAGGED_WITH]->(f:Field)
where f.name in fields
match (d)-[:CITED_IN]-(b:Book where b.title is not null)
with b, count(distinct d) as n_mentions
return b.title as Libro, n_mentions as `N. citazioni` order by `N. citazioni` desc
#  *Tematiche dei libri citati*

reports.title: Anni in cui vengono citati i libri contrassegnati con il field selezionato
reports.query:
with range(1648, 1668) as period
call {
match (r:Field) where r.name = $neodash_rootField
OPTIONAL MATCH (f)-[:SUBFIELD_OF*]->(r)
WITH r, CASE WHEN f IS NOT NULL THEN f ELSE r END AS child
WITH r, collect(child.name) as children
return children + r.name AS fields
}
with period, fields order by period asc
unwind period as year
with year, fields
optional match (d:Document)<-[:CITED_IN]-(b:Book) where d.year = year 
with year, fields, count(distinct b) as totBooksYear
optional match (d:Document)<-[:CITED_IN]-(b:Book)-[:TAGGED_WITH]-(fb:Field)
where d.year = year and fb.name in fields
return year, totBooksYear as `Totale libri citati`, count(distinct b) as `N. libri nel field`

reports.title: Field dei libri in circolazione
reports.query:
match (r:Field) 
where r.main is not null
call {
with r
OPTIONAL MATCH (f)-[:SUBFIELD_OF*]->(r)
WITH r, CASE WHEN f IS NOT NULL THEN f ELSE r END AS child
WITH r, collect(child.name) as children
return children + r.name AS fields
}
with r, fields
match (d:Document)<-[:CITED_IN]-(b:Book)-[:TAGGED_WITH]->(f:Field)
where f.name in fields
return r.name as Field, count(distinct b) as `N. libri nel Field`
order by `N. libri nel Field` desc
limit 10

reports.title: Top 10 libri più citati
reports.query:
MATCH (d:Document)<-[:CITED_IN]-(b:Book where b.title is not null)
RETURN b.title AS Libro,count(d) as `N. citazioni`
ORDER BY `N. citazioni` DESC
limit 10

reports.title: Libri citati da più autori
reports.query:
match (b:Book)-[:CITED_IN]->(d:Document)-[:WRITTEN_BY]->(p:Person)
with b, count(distinct p.name) as num, collect(distinct p.name) as people order by num desc
where num >1 
call {
with b, num, people
unwind people as person
return  b as interB, num as interNum, apoc.text.replace(person, ", ", " ") as per
}
with interB , interNum as `N. persone`, collect(per) as `Persone che citano il Libro`
with  interB, `N. persone`
optional match (interB)-[:CITED_IN]-(d:Document)
with interB.title as Libro, `N. persone`, count(distinct d) as `N. citazioni`
where Libro is not null
return Libro, `N. persone`,`N. citazioni`
order by `N. citazioni` desc

reports.title: Libro selezionato
reports.query: RETURN  $neodash_book

reports.title: Fields del libro selezionato
reports.query:
MATCH (b:Book)-[:TAGGED_WITH]-(f:Field) 
WHERE b.title = $neodash_book 
RETURN collect(f.name) as Fields

reports.title: Associazione del libro con i temi di discussione
reports.query:
match (b)-[:CITED_IN]->(d:Document)-[:TAGGED_WITH]-(f:Field)
where b.title = $neodash_book
return f.name as Field, count(distinct d) as `N.Documenti in Field`
order by `N.Documenti in Field` desc
limit 10

reports.title: Da chi è stato citato il libro?
reports.query:
MATCH (d:Document)<-[:CITED_IN]-(b:Book{title:$neodash_book})
match (p:Person)<-[:WRITTEN_BY]-(d)
WITH p,b,count(distinct d) as c
order by c  desc limit 12
RETURN b,apoc.create.vRelationship(b, "IN", {weight: toFloat(c)}, p),p

reports.title: Quando è stato citato il libro (rispetto al totale dei libri citati negli anni)?
reports.query:
with range(1648, 1667) as period
unwind period as year
call {with year
      optional match (doc:Document)<-[:CITED_IN]-(:Book)
      where year = doc.year
      return count(distinct doc) as totCitingYear
}
with year, totCitingYear
optional match (b:Book)-[:CITED_IN]->(d:Document)
where year = d.year and b.title = $neodash_book
return year as Anno,
totCitingYear as `N. doc con citazioni`,
count(distinct d) as `N. doc che citano il libro` order by year

value: N. doc che citano il libro

reports.title: Da dove scriveva?
reports.query:
MATCH (place:Location)<-[r:WRITTEN_FROM]-(:Document)-[:WRITTEN_BY]-(p:Person)
WHERE p.name = $neodash_person_name
RETURN place

reports.title: Seleziona la persona
reports.query:
match (p:Person)<-[:WRITTEN_BY|RECEIVED_BY]-(d:Document) 
with p.name as name, count(d) as `N.doc scritti/ricevuti` order by `N.doc scritti/ricevuti` desc
where `N.doc scritti/ricevuti` >1
return name, `N.doc scritti/ricevuti`

reports.title: Persona selezionata
reports.query: RETURN apoc.text.replace( $neodash_person_name, ",", "")

reports.title: Nato nel
reports.query:
MATCH (p:Person where p.birth is not null)
WHERE p.name = $neodash_person_name
RETURN toString(p.birth)

reports.title: Morto nel
reports.query:
MATCH (p:Person where p.death is not null)
WHERE p.name = $neodash_person_name
RETURN toString(p.death)

reports.title: In che anni scriveva (rispetto alla produzione totale) ?
reports.query:
match (p:Person)<-[:WRITTEN_BY]-(d:Document)
where p.name = $neodash_person_name 
with min(d.year) as mn, max(d.year) as mx
with range(mn-1, mx+1) as period
unwind period as year
match (d:Document) 
where d.year = year
with  year, count(distinct d) as `Totale Documenti`
MATCH (p:Person{name:$neodash_person_name})
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)<-[:WRITTEN_BY]-(d:Document)
WHERE d.year = year
return year, `Totale Documenti`, count(distinct d) as`Documenti scritti dall'autore`

reports.title: Luogo del mittente
reports.query:
MATCH (pl:Location)<-[r:WRITTEN_FROM]-(d:Document)-[:WRITTEN_BY]-(p:Person)
RETURN pl, count(p) AS c

reports.title: Specifiche tematiche delle lettere scritte
reports.query:
MATCH (p:Person{name:$neodash_person_name})-[:WRITTEN_BY]-(:Document)-[:TAGGED_WITH]->(f:Tag)
WITH f,count(*) AS doc,p order by doc desc
WITH f,toFloat(doc) AS w,p
return f,p,apoc.create.vRelationship(f, "IN", {weight: w}, p)

reports.title: Numero lettere scritte
reports.query:
MATCH (p:Person)<-[:WRITTEN_BY]-(d:Document)
WHERE p.name = $neodash_person_name
RETURN count(distinct d)

reports.title: A chi scriveva e di cosa (si mostrano le top 12 tematiche più frequenti)?
reports.query:
// Step 1: Get top 12 field names
MATCH (p1 {name:$neodash_person_name})<-[:WRITTEN_BY]-(d)-[:TAGGED_WITH]->(f:Field)
WITH p1, f, count(DISTINCT d) AS fieldFreq
ORDER BY fieldFreq DESC
LIMIT 12
WITH p1, collect(f.name) AS topFieldNames

// Step 2: Get people who have >=2 documents with p1, tagged with those top fields
MATCH (p1)-[:WRITTEN_BY]-(d)-[:TAGGED_WITH]->(f:Field),
      (d)-[:RECEIVED_BY]->(p2:Person)
WHERE f.name IN topFieldNames
WITH p1, topFieldNames, p2, count(DISTINCT d) AS docCount
WHERE docCount >= 5
WITH p1, topFieldNames, collect(p2.name) AS topPeopleNames

// Step 3: Filter documents again for those fields and people
MATCH (p1)-[:WRITTEN_BY]-(d)-[:RECEIVED_BY]->(p2:Person),
      (d)-[:TAGGED_WITH]->(f:Field)
WHERE f.name IN topFieldNames AND p2.name IN topPeopleNames

// Aggregate documents
WITH p1, p2, f, count(DISTINCT d) AS docs
WITH p1, f, collect(p2) AS pList, collect(docs) AS countList 
WITH p1, f, pList, countList, reduce(acc = 0, v IN countList | acc + v) AS totFields
ORDER BY totFields DESC

// Create virtual relationship from p1 to f
WITH p1, pList, countList, f, apoc.create.vRelationship(p1, 'IN', {weight: toFloat(totFields)}, f) AS rel

// Create virtual relationships from f to people
UNWIND range(0, size(pList) - 1) AS i
WITH DISTINCT p1, pList[i] AS other, countList[i] AS c, f, rel
RETURN p1, f, rel, other, apoc.create.vRelationship(f, "IN", {weight: toFloat(c)}, other)

reports.title: Numero lettere ricevute
reports.query:
MATCH (p:Person)<-[:RECEIVED_BY]-(d:Document)
WHERE p.name = $neodash_person_name
RETURN count(distinct d)

reports.title: Specifiche Tematiche delle lettere ricevute
Da chi riceveva lettere e in quale ambito
reports.query:
MATCH (p1:Person {name:$neodash_person_name})<-[:RECEIVED_BY]-(d:Document)-[:WRITTEN_BY]->(p2:Person)
WITH p1, p2, count(distinct d) AS tot_doc_exchanged order by tot_doc_exchanged desc limit 15
MATCH (p1)<-[:RECEIVED_BY]-(d:Document)-[:WRITTEN_BY]->(p2)
MATCH (d)-[:TAGGED_WITH]->(f:Field)
WITH p1, p2, f, count(distinct d) AS docs
WITH p1, f, collect(p2) as pList, collect(docs) as countList
WITH p1,pList,countList,f,reduce(acc = 0, v in countList | acc + v) AS totFields order by totFields desc limit 10
WITH f,pList,countList,p1,apoc.create.vRelationship (f, 'IN',{weight:toFloat(totFields)}, p1) AS rel
UNWIND range(0,size(pList)-1) AS i
WITH DISTINCT p1, pList[i] as other, countList[i] as c,f,rel
RETURN other, f, apoc.create.vRelationship(other, "IN", {weight: toFloat(c)}, f),  p1, rel
# *Statistiche per persona*

reports.title: Network di corrispondenza
reports.query:
match (p1:MainComponent)-[r:WROTE_TO]-(p2:MainComponent)
return p1, r, p2

reports.title: Temi di discussione nel gruppo
reports.query:
match (s:Person where s.name=$neodash_person_name_1) 
MATCH (p:Person)-[r:WROTE_IN_FIELD]->(f:Field)
WHERE p.louvain = s.louvain
WITH f.name as field, sum(r.weight) as tot
RETURN field, tot
ORDER BY tot DESC limit 8

reports.title: Inserisci il nome per vedere i field
reports.query:
MATCH (n:`Person`) 
WHERE toLower(toString(n.`name`)) CONTAINS toLower($input) 
RETURN DISTINCT n.`name` as value,  n.`name` as display ORDER BY size(toString(value)) ASC LIMIT 1000

reports.title: Lettere scritte da membri del gruppo
reports.query:
MATCH (p:Person)
WHERE p.name = $neodash_person_name_p1
with p 
optional MATCH (p1:Person)-[r:WROTE_TO]->(p2)
WHERE p1.louvain = p.louvain and p2.louvain = p1.louvain
with p1, sum(r.times) as `intra-gruppo`
OPTIONAL MATCH (p1)-[r:WROTE_TO]->(p2)
WHERE p1.louvain <> p2.louvain
RETURN p1.name AS Persona,`intra-gruppo`,sum(r.times) AS `inter-gruppo`
ORDER BY `intra-gruppo` DESC, `inter-gruppo`
## *Studio della network di corrispondenza*

reports.title: Numero volte citato
reports.query:
match (p:Person) where p.name = $neodash_person_name
optional MATCH (p)-[:QUOTED_IN]->(d)-[:WRITTEN_BY]-()
return count(distinct d) as NumeroDoc

reports.title: Da chi è stato citato e in quale ambito
reports.query:
MATCH (p1:Person {name:$neodash_person_name})-[:QUOTED_IN]->(d:Document)-[:WRITTEN_BY]->(p2:Person)
WITH p1, p2, count(distinct d) as tot order by tot desc limit 12
MATCH (p1)-[:QUOTED_IN]->(d:Document)-[:WRITTEN_BY]->(p2)
MATCH (d)-[:TAGGED_WITH]->(f:Field)
WITH p1, p2, f, count(distinct d) AS docs
WITH p1, f, collect(p2) as pList, collect(docs) as countList 
WITH p1,pList,countList,f,reduce(acc = 0, v in countList | acc + v) AS totFields order by totFields desc limit 10
WITH f,pList,countList,p1,apoc.create.vRelationship (f, 'IN',{weight:toFloat(totFields)}, p1) AS rel
UNWIND range(0,size(pList)-1) AS i
WITH DISTINCT p1, pList[i] as other, countList[i] as c,f,rel
RETURN other, f, apoc.create.vRelationship(other, "IN", {weight: toFloat(c)}, f),  p1, rel

reports.title: Luogo del destinatario
reports.query:
MATCH (pl:Location)<-[r:RECEIVED_IN]-(:Document)-[RECEIVED_BY]-(p:Person)
RETURN pl,count(p) AS c

RETURN p.name AS Persona,count(distinct d) AS written
ORDER BY written DESC

reports.title: Principali destinatari

RETURN p.name AS Persona,count(distinct d) AS written

reports.title: Seleziona mittente
reports.query:
match (p:Person)-[:WRITTEN_BY]-(d:Document)
return distinct p.name as Name, count(d) as `Sent letters`
ORDER BY `Sent letters` desc

reports.title: Mittente
reports.query: return $neodash_sender

reports.title: Seleziona destinatario
reports.query:
match (p1:Person)-[:WRITTEN_BY]-(d:Document)-[:RECEIVED_BY]-(p2:Person)
where p1.name = $neodash_sender
return distinct p2.name as Name, count(d) as `Received letters`
ORDER BY `Received letters` desc

reports.title: Destinatario
reports.query: return $neodash_receiver

reports.title: Seleziona mittente, destinatario e anno per vedere i temi discussi.
reports.query:
// Step 1: Filter letters exchanged between sender and receiver in the given year
MATCH (p1:Person)<-[:WRITTEN_BY]-(d:Document)-[:TAGGED_WITH]->(f:Field),
      (p2:Person)<-[:RECEIVED_BY]-(d)
WHERE p1.name = $neodash_sender 
  AND p2.name = $neodash_receiver 
  AND toString(d.year) = $neodash_year

// Step 2: Count documents per topic
WITH f.name AS topic, count(DISTINCT d) AS numDocs
ORDER BY numDocs DESC
LIMIT 10

// Step 3: Return results
RETURN 
  $neodash_year AS `Anno`,
  topic AS `Tema di discussione`,
  CASE WHEN numDocs < 1 THEN 0.001 ELSE numDocs END AS `N. Documenti`
ORDER BY `N. Documenti` DESC

reports.title: Seleziona l'anno
reports.query:
match (p1:Person)-[:WRITTEN_BY]-(d:Document)-[:RECEIVED_BY]-(p2:Person)
where p1.name = $neodash_sender and p2.name = $neodash_receiver
and d.year is not null
return distinct toString(d.year)  as Year, count(d) as `Received letters`
ORDER BY `Received letters` desc

reports.title: Locating instrument mentions
reports.query:
match p = (h1:Human)-[m:MENTIONS_TO]->(h2:Human)
where $neodash_tool in m.instruments 
//AND $neodash_document_year_1648<=m.date.year<=$neodash_document_year_1680
return p

reports.title: Select an instrument
reports.query:
MATCH (d:Document)<-[:CITED_IN]-(i:Instrument)
OPTIONAL MATCH (root)<-[:CHILD_OF*1]-(i)
WITH d, CASE WHEN root IS NOT NULL THEN root ELSE i END AS parent
WITH parent, count(DISTINCT d) AS `N. mentions` 
RETURN parent.name AS Instrument, `N. mentions` 
ORDER BY `N. mentions`  DESC

reports.title: First mention
reports.query:
MATCH (d:Document)<-[:CITED_IN]-(i:Instrument)
where i.name = $neodash_tool
return min(d.year) + "" as first_year

reports.title: Graph of instrument mentions
reports.query:
match p = (h1:Human)-[m:MENTIONS_TO]->(h2:Human)
where $neodash_tool in m.instruments 
AND $neodash_document_year_1630<=m.date.year<=$neodash_document_year_1680
return p

reports.title: Last mention
reports.query:
MATCH (d:Document)<-[:CITED_IN]-(i:Instrument)
where i.name = $neodash_tool
return max(d.year) + "" as first_year

reports.title: Instrument mentions over time
reports.query:
MATCH (i:Instrument where i.name = $neodash_tool)
OPTIONAL MATCH (i)<-[:CHILD_OF*]-(child) 
with  i, collect(child.name) + i.name as tools
match (d:Document)-[:CITED_IN]-(in:Instrument) where in.name in tools
with range(min(d.year), max(d.year)) as period, tools
unwind period as year
call {with year, tools
  unwind tools as tool
  match (d:Document)<-[:CITED_IN]-(f:Instrument)
  where f.name = tool and d.year = year
  return year as year_id, count(distinct d) as n_mentions}
return year_id, n_mentions

reports.title: Main Topics discussed by people mentioning the instrument
reports.query:
// collect all children/parents for a tool if any
MATCH (i:Instrument where i.name = $neodash_tool)
OPTIONAL MATCH (i)-[:CHILD_OF*]-(child) 
with  i, collect(child.name) + i.name as tools
// find people that have mentioned the instrument(or its children)
match (p:Person)-[:WRITTEN_BY|:RECEIVED_BY]-(d:Document)-[:CITED_IN]-(ins:Instrument)
where ins.name in tools
with p// retrieve topics those people discussed in their letters (any letter)
match (p)<-[:WRITTEN_BY]-(d:Document)-[:TAGGED_WITH]->(f:Field)
WITH distinct  f, count(distinct d) AS docs order by docs desc 
with f, docs  limit 10 // take 10 most impo topics
with f, range($neodash_document_year_1648, $neodash_document_year_1680) as period
unwind period as year
optional match (p)<-[:WRITTEN_BY]-(d)-[:TAGGED_WITH]->(fd:Field)
where fd.name = f.name and d.year = year
with  year, f, count(distinct d) as numDocs 
return year as `Anno`,
case when numDocs<1 then 0.001 else numDocs end as `N. Documenti`,
f.name as `Tema di discussione` order by `Anno`

reports.title: Select starting year
reports.query:
MATCH (n:`Document`) 
WHERE toLower(toString(n.`year`)) CONTAINS toLower($input) 
RETURN DISTINCT n.`year` as value,  n.`year` as display ORDER BY size(toString(value)) ASC LIMIT 5

reports.title: Select ending year
reports.query:
MATCH (n:`Document`) 
WHERE toLower(toString(n.`year`)) CONTAINS toLower($input) 
RETURN DISTINCT n.`year` as value,  n.`year` as display ORDER BY size(toString(value)) ASC LIMIT 5
return $neodash_tool

reports.title: Locating experiment mentions
reports.query:
match p = (h1:Human)-[m:MENTIONS_TO]->(h2:Human)
where $neodash_experiment in m.experiments 
//AND $neodash_document_year_1648<=m.date.year<=$neodash_document_year_1680
return p

reports.title: Select an experiment
reports.query:
MATCH (d:Document)<-[:CITED_IN]-(i:Experiment)
OPTIONAL MATCH (root)-[:PARENT_OF*1]->(i)
WITH d, CASE WHEN root IS NOT NULL THEN root ELSE i END AS parent
WITH parent, count(DISTINCT d) AS `N. mentions` 
RETURN parent.name AS Experiment, `N. mentions` 
ORDER BY `N. mentions`  DESC

reports.title: First mentioned in
reports.query:
MATCH (d:Document)<-[:CITED_IN]-(i:Experiment)
where i.name = $neodash_experiment
return min(d.year) + "" as first_year

reports.title: Last mentioned in
reports.query:
MATCH (d:Document)<-[:CITED_IN]-(i:Experiment)
where i.name = $neodash_experiment
return max(d.year) + "" as last_year

reports.title: Graph of experiment mentions
reports.query:
match p = (h1:Human)-[m:MENTIONS_TO]->(h2:Human)
where $neodash_experiment in m.experiments 
AND $neodash_document_year_1630<=m.date.year<=$neodash_document_year_1680
return p

reports.title: Select the start year
reports.query:
MATCH (n:`Document`) 
WHERE toLower(toString(n.`year`)) CONTAINS toLower($input) 
RETURN DISTINCT n.`year` as value,  n.`year` as display ORDER BY size(toString(value)) ASC LIMIT 5

reports.title: Select the end year
reports.query:
MATCH (n:`Document`) 
WHERE toLower(toString(n.`year`)) CONTAINS toLower($input) 
RETURN DISTINCT n.`year` as value,  n.`year` as display ORDER BY size(toString(value)) ASC LIMIT 5

reports.title: Selected experiment:
reports.query: return $neodash_experiment

reports.title: Experiment mentions over time
reports.query:
MATCH (i:Experiment where i.name = $neodash_experiment)
OPTIONAL MATCH (i)-[:PARENT_OF*]->(child) 
with  i, collect(child.name) + i.name as tools
match (d:Document)-[:CITED_IN]-(in:Experiment) where in.name in tools
with range(min(d.year), max(d.year)) as period, tools
unwind period as year
call {with year, tools
  unwind tools as tool
  match (d:Document)<-[:CITED_IN]-(f:Experiment)
  where f.name = tool and d.year = year
  return year as year_id, count(distinct d) as n_mentions}
return year_id, n_mentions

reports.title: Main Topics discussed by people mentioning the experiment
reports.query:
// collect all children/parents for a tool if any
MATCH (i:Experiment where i.name = $neodash_experiment)
OPTIONAL MATCH (i)-[:PARENT_OF*]->(child) 
with  i, collect(child.name) + i.name as tools
// find people that have mentioned the instrument(or its children)
match (p:Person)-[:WRITTEN_BY|:RECEIVED_BY]-(d:Document)-[:CITED_IN]-(ins:Experiment)
where ins.name in tools
with p// retrieve topics those people discussed in their letters (any letter)
match (p)<-[:WRITTEN_BY]-(d:Document)-[:TAGGED_WITH]->(f:Field)
WITH distinct  f, count(distinct d) AS docs order by docs desc 
with f, docs  limit 10 // take 10 most impo topics
with f, range($neodash_document_year_1648, $neodash_document_year_1680) as period
unwind period as year
optional match (p)<-[:WRITTEN_BY]-(d)-[:TAGGED_WITH]->(fd:Field)
where fd.name = f.name and d.year = year
with  year, f, count(distinct d) as numDocs 
return year as `Anno`,
case when numDocs<1 then 0.001 else numDocs end as `N. Documenti`,
f.name as `Tema di discussione` order by `Anno`
